Table 3: Statistical interactions between individual or combined transformations and the drop in success rate based on the two-way permutation test (p-value<0.05). The effect size of Â12<0.5 indicate a harmful impact on the APR success rate.

Table 2: Success rate statistics (mean ± σ ) for bug repairs using original versus semantically transformed code snippets on Defects4J and GitBug-Java. Analysis limited to solvable bugs (original SR > 0%). Statistical significance assessed via Wilcoxon signed-rank test and Vargha-Delaney (Â12) statistics.
